name: mit-lecture-study-sidebar
description: Chrome extension for turning MIT YouTube lecture content into progressive Chinese outlines with DeepSeek.

scripts.check: node --check src/content.js && node --check src/transcript-utils-content.js && node --check src/page-bridge.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/options.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check scripts/lecture-csv-store.mjs && node --check scripts/lecture-csv-server.mjs
scripts.test: node test/test-transcript-utils.mjs && node test/test-background-utils.mjs && node test/test-harness-files.mjs && node test/test-lecture-csv-store.mjs && node test/test-ui-smoke.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test
scripts.pack:zip: node scripts/package-extension.mjs && cd dist && zip -qr mit-lecture-study-sidebar.zip mit-lecture-study-sidebar
